ddt:Target.Name: ULC4.5_v1.2
ddt:Target.Description:
******************** HISTORY ******************** V1.0 31-07-2018 : Initial version of ULC4.5 database.
V1.2 29-10-2018 1.Wifi monitoring coding updated 2.Wifi_Name2 DID $231A added 3.$231B,$231C,$231D,$231E added 4.Boot Version($F180) access modified 5.AF activation added under ECU configuration $2111 6.Rear View Camera bit poistion deleted from DID $2111 7.UPA HMI bit added under ADAS DID($2317) 8.RVC reaction time and RVC temporization time added under DID $2319 9.modified SWRC type as 2 bit information. 10.Gyro config bit position changed

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: OutputTemporaryControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Item.Text: Request for availibility LID from 0 to 19
Request for availibility LID from 21 to 39

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Fixed value (identifies a break in the ECU diag definition)

Data.Name: LastAfterSalesOperationDate.Day
Data.Comment: Day of Last after sales operation date (BCD coding)

Data.Name: LastAfterSalesOperationDate.Month
Data.Comment: Month of Last after sales operation date (BCD coding)

Data.Name: LastAfterSalesOperationDate.Year
Data.Comment: Year of Last after sales operation date (BCD coding)

Data.Name: ECU Config.Antenna phantom PS
Data.Comment: AM/FM antenna phantom power supply configuration

Data.Name: ECU Config.SWRC type
Data.Comment: Steering Wheel Remote Control Type configuration

Data.Name: ECU Config.DR Phantom PS
Data.Comment: Digital radio antenna phantom power supply configuration

Data.Name: UI Config.Restriction
Data.Comment: Feature restriction while driving (car is moving)

Data.Name: SWRC_button.LOW_Pressed
Data.Comment: SWRC "Low" button pressed since last clear

Data.Name: SWRC_button.HIGH_Pressed
Data.Comment: SWRC "High" button pressed since last clear

Data.Name: SWRC_button.SUP_Pressed
Data.Comment: SWRC "Sup" button pressed since last clear

Data.Name: SWRC_button.VOL_minus_Pressed
Data.Comment: SWRC "Volume -" button pressed since last clear

Data.Name: SWRC_button.VOL_plus_Pressed
Data.Comment: SWRC "Volume +" button pressed since last clear

Data.Name: SWRC_button.DOWNtoUP_Pressed
Data.Comment: SWRC Rotary Down to Up (ACBA type) since last clear

Data.Name: SWRC_button.UPtoDOWN_Pressed
Data.Comment: SWRC Rotary Up to Down (ABCA type) since last clear

Data.Name: SWRC_button.DOWNtoUP
Data.Comment: SWRC Rotary has moved down to Up (ACBA type) within last 2 seconds

Data.Name: SWRC_button.UPtoDOWN
Data.Comment: SWRC Rotary has moved up to down (ABCA type) within last 2 seconds

Data.Name: PartNumber
Data.Comment: Renault reference part number written in ASCII

Item.Text: Test completed OK : default not present
Default not yet checked by the ECU
Default detected, confirmed but not more present

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version active in the ECU

Data.Name: SWRC_button.phone&mute_Pressed
Data.Comment: SWRC "phone&mute" button of type2 pressed since last clear

Data.Name: SWRC_button.phone&mute
Data.Comment: SWRC "phone&mute" button of type2 is currently pressed

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version (edition) active in the ECU

Data.Name: HardwareNumber.LowerPart
Data.Comment: Identifies the hardware version of the ECU

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: ECU Config2.SWRC2 type
Data.Comment: Steering Wheel Remote Control 2 Type configuration

Data.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1
Data.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1

Data.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 2
Data.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 2

Data.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 3
Data.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 3

Data.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 1
Data.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 1

Data.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 2
Data.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 2

Data.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 3
Data.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 3

Data.Name: Parameters for AM/FM tuner.FieldMax
Data.Comment: antenna field Max [dBµV], maximum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: Parameters for AM/FM tuner.FieldMean
Data.Comment: antenna field Mean [dBµV], average value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: Parameters for AM/FM tuner.FieldMin
Data.Comment: antenna field Min [dBµV], minimum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: Parameters for AM/FM tuner.Frequency
Data.Comment: Frequency Tune $xxx.x, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM$xxxx [KHz], 9KHz step if LW

Data.Name: ECU Config.SWRC2 type
Data.Comment: Steering Wheel Remote Control 2 Type configuration

Data.Name: Routinestatus
Data.Comment: Read the status of the routine

Item.Text: RRROR.System shall be configured to Wifi 2.4 GHz only
Wifi 2.4 GHz supported and wifi 5 GHz is disabled
Wifi 5 GHz is supported and 2.4 GHz is disabled

Data.Name: SPCX wifi.Android Auto in wifi mode
SPCX wifi.Apple Carplay in wifi mode

Item.Text: Eco/ comfort if CF_Car_type= RS(Applicability from RadNad 2.2)

Data.Name: RVC configuration. Image V mirror display
RVC configuration.Trunk open handling display message
RVC configuration.Trunk open handling disable RVC
RVC configuration.Rear cam dynamic/fixed guide lines

Item.Text: No dynamic lines, No fixed lines

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear
Without welcome sequence in the cluster
With Welcome sequence in the cluster

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1
Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1

Request.Name: DataWrite.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1
Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1

Request.Name: DataRead.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 2
Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 2

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 2

Request.Name: DataWrite.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 2
Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 2

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 2

Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 3

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 3

Request.Name: DataWrite.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 3
Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 3

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 3

Request.Name: DataRead.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 1
Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 1

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 1

Request.Name: DataWrite.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 1
Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 1

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 1

Request.Name: DataRead.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 2
Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 2

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 2

Request.Name: DataWrite.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 2
Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 2

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 2

Request.Name: DataRead.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 3
Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 3

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 3

Request.Name: DataWrite.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 3
Request.Comment: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 3

DataItem.Name: SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 3
SPCX wifi.Apple Carplay in wifi mode
SPCX wifi.Android Auto in wifi mode
SPCX wifi.Apple Carplay in wifi mode
SPCX wifi.Android Auto in wifi mode

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ECUReset.keyoffon
Request.Comment: Key OFF / Key ON Reset of ECU

DataItem.Name: RVC configuration.Rear cam dynamic/fixed guide lines
RVC configuration. Image V mirror display
RVC configuration.Trunk open handling display message
RVC configuration.Trunk open handling disable RVC
RVC configuration.Rear cam dynamic/fixed guide lines
RVC configuration. Image V mirror display
RVC configuration.Trunk open handling display message
RVC configuration.Trunk open handling disable RVC

Label.Text: Digital radio antenna phantom power supply

Input.DataName: RVC configuration. Image V mirror display
RVC configuration.Trunk open handling display message
RVC configuration.Trunk open handling disable RVC
RVC configuration.Rear cam dynamic/fixed guide lines

Display.DataName: RVC configuration. Image V mirror display
RVC configuration.Trunk open handling display message
RVC configuration.Trunk open handling disable RVC
RVC configuration.Rear cam dynamic/fixed guide lines

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
This parameter is used to configure the whole car acoustic.
This parameter is used to configure the bluetooth phone acoustic.
CNF_PACT1 (first part of phone acoustic parameter)
CNF_PACT2 (second part of phone acoustic parameter)
CNF_PACT3 (third part of phone acoustic parameter)
This parameter is used to configure SPVR parameter 1
This parameter is used to configure SPVR parameter 2
This parameter is used to configure SPVR parameter 3
This configuration will change BT phone hands-free sound output.
SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1
SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 2
SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 3
SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 1
SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 2
SPCX Carplay HFSQ Wide band parameter 3

Button.Text: Write SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1

Send.RequestName: DataWrite.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1

Button.Text: Write SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 2

Write SPCX Carplay VR Siri parameter 2
Write SPCX Carplay VR Siri parameter 3

Display.RequestName: DataRead.SPCX Carplay HFSQ Narrow band parameter 1

Input.DataName: SPCX wifi.Apple Carplay in wifi mode

Display.DataName: SPCX wifi.Apple Carplay in wifi mode

Input.DataName: SPCX wifi.Android Auto in wifi mode

Display.DataName: SPCX wifi.Android Auto in wifi mode

Button.Text: Read Mileage of the last occurrence counter

Label.Text: By using this request, ECU should be able to issue a tone following loudspeaker line number, frequency and sound level given as parameters.
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
This routine displays a permanent black screen:
This routine displays a permanent white screen:
This routine displays a cyclic black-white screen sequence (3 times):
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
This routine is used to check rear view camera functionality.
This routine displays rear view picture.
This routine is used to calibrate rear view camera guidelines settings.
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
By using this request, ECU should be able to set a tuner to the requested frequency
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
When requested by diag tool, Bluetooth RSSI & Link quality should be returned. Conditions: Mobile phone must be connected.

When requested by diag tool, Self diagnosis status should be returned. This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0

When a sound is requested, ECU must: 1. Mute all sources. 2. Issue the requested sound. 3. Activate microphon.4. Return to normal state. services will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available
